_comment: Transparent, tunable weather-shaping per disease family (NOT machine learning). Each family maps trailing daily weather into a 0-100 environmental-favourability sub-score that feeds the 'weather' signal of the consolidation engine. Mosquito: unimodal temperature response peaking near temp_optimal_c, times lagged rainfall (standing water) and humidity. Waterborne: recent plus lagged rainfall as a contamination proxy, temperature minor. Febrile: humidity and day-to-day temperature variability. Refine weights against intuition during the weather eyeball pass.
